$comment: D-LK4-RODATA-PRODUCER-AGGREGATE-GLOBAL (initialized aggregate globals → byte-exact rodata via encodeAggregateValue) + D-CSUBSET-STRUCT-BODY-VARDECL-POSITION (bare top-level struct def → TypeDecl + bare tag-REF return head `struct Tri make(void)`). Witnesses EVERY encoder form as a byte-exact pin: PADDING (gpad.val=19 at offset 4 after char+pad), PARTIAL-init zero-fill (gpart b,c=0), UNION first-member init (gun.i=6), NESTED aggregate (gnest), ARRAY stride (gv). 19+10+6+4+3=42; each summand is read from a const-init global, so a wrong offset/missed zero-fill/bad stride flips the exit (the negative miscompile pin). The release optimizedPipelines arm proves optimized==baseline. arm64 runs under qemu; macho on the macos-latest leg.
